Hana Kim
Senior Retail Buyer — Womenswear, New York, NY
hana.kim@example.com | 555-201-3009 | linkedin.com/in/hana-kim-buyer

SUMMARY
Retail buyer and merchandiser with 6 years in fashion buying and assortment
planning for a national apparel retailer. Owns open-to-buy, vendor negotiation,
and markdown strategy to maximize sell-through and margin.

EXPERIENCE
Senior Buyer, Womenswear — Avenue Retail Group (2021–present)
- Manage a $40M womenswear buying budget; build seasonal assortment plans and
  open-to-buy to balance newness, depth, and margin.
- Negotiate cost, terms, and exclusives with vendors; partner with planning on
  allocation and markdown strategy to drive sell-through.
- Analyze weekly sell-through, inventory, and category performance to drive
  in-season reorders and markdowns.

Assistant Buyer / Merchandiser — Trend House (2018–2021)
- Supported buying and merchandising for accessories; tracked inventory,
  allocation, and vendor purchase orders.

SKILLS
Retail buying, merchandising, assortment planning, open-to-buy, vendor
negotiation, markdown, sell-through, allocation, inventory, category management,
margin, fashion, product, demand planning, seasonal planning

EDUCATION
B.S. Fashion Merchandising, Fashion Institute of Technology (FIT), 2018
